name: aiden-tasks
description: Create/find/update your AIDEN (clicktrackerx.com) tasks via the /aiden-tasks:aiden command + MCP tools (OAuth login, no key). Plus /aiden-tasks:aiden-vault for task/project credentials, and /aiden-tasks:aiden-assets to manage project/user/task assets (files, folders, versions, approval) and project contacts. Optional per-branch session auto-logging (needs a per-user key).
